description: Composition White leggings made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has an elasticated waistband and lace detailing on the ends Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Warm iron only Get your little one up and about in a pair of leggings from gini and jony. Team this with a white tee and comfy footwear when you take her out the next time. The blended fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
